ground_truth.title: How To Book a Flight For Beginners
ground_truth.author: Maria & Katerina
ground_truth.main_content:
This guide on how to book a flight for beginners is your go-to tool to a stress-free flight-booking experience. Booking flights online for the very first time might sound like a very stressful affair, but we're here to break down this procedure for you and take it one step at a time. This guide focuses on three main factors that should be considered when booking flights: sustainability, comfort and budget, in that order.

SUSTAINABILITY: The best way to fly responsibly is to choose direct flights when possible. Taking one flight instead of two to get from point A to point B helps reduce your carbon footprint. When it comes to long-haul flights, flying direct isn't always an option, so making a short trip out of your transit destination is the most sustainable way to go.

COMFORT: Choosing a low-cost airline for a long-haul flight means you'll have to put up with the limited legroom for hours. Full-service carriers usually allow you one personal item and one carry-on on board, maximizing your luggage allowance. Many travellers prefer early morning flights, but evening flights allow you all the time you need to get prepared without frantically running around the house.

BUDGET: Flight prices resemble stock markets these days. When you find a good deal, run and grab those tickets before they're gone. Tips to save money include researching credit cards with travel rewards, avoiding checked bags when possible, being flexible with dates and nearby airports, booking well in advance, and using flight aggregator websites.

WAYAWAY FLIGHT AGGREGATOR: WayAway stands out with its fantastic cashback offers of up to 5% when you buy flight tickets, and up to 10% off Booking.com, 8% off GetYourGuide and more. The interface is straightforward and user-friendly with helpful filters like baggage information, flights operated by a single airline, alliances, and payment methods. The WayAway Plus Membership includes 24/7 support from travel experts.

After reading this guide, you should feel more confident when booking your next trip. Remember that what matters is the places we visit, the people we meet and the cultures we become acquainted with.
with: The best way to fly responsibly is to choose direct flights when possible.
Choosing a low-cost airline for a long-haul flight means that you'll have to put up with the limited legroom for hours and hours on end.
Try to be flexible and consider checking other dates or even nearby airports.
What makes WayAway stand out from other flight aggregators is the WayAway Plus Membership.
As a member of WayAway Plus, you can gain cashback of up to 5% when you buy flight tickets.

items.alt: This is a screenshot from WayAway that shows the price chart for a New York - Rome flight. Checking flight aggregator websites is the first step when learning how to book a flight for beginners.
items.caption: Browsing through WayAway is one of the best ways to search for flights. Photo Credit: Screenshot from the WayAway website

items.alt: This is a screenshot from WayAway that shows price results after a search for New York - Rome flights.
items.caption: Our initial search was for April 14 – 26, but then we decided to click the April 16 – 23 search box that showed a price of $581. Photo Credit: Screenshot from the WayAway website

items.alt: This is a screenshot from WayAway that shows price results after a search for New York - Rome flights.
items.caption: Once we clicked the April 16 – 23 search box, the price changed to $752 for the same dates. Photo Credit: Screenshot from the WayAway website

items.alt: This is a screenshot from WayAway that shows a price chart after a search for New York - Rome flights.
items.caption: From these charts, it's easy to see when prices are expected to go up. Photo Credit: Screenshot from the WayAway website

items.alt: This is a screenshot from WayAway that shows price results after a search for New York - Rome flights.
items.caption: While the chart above showed that the starting price for October 3 to 13 was $629, once we clicked on that date, we were welcomed with the significantly lower price of $522. Photo Credit: Screenshot from the WayAway website
